name: Import a supplier part for an existing part via the Suppliers panel
steps:
Given a supplier mixin plugin is installed, enabled, and configured with the supplier company and API token
Given a user with 'create' permission is logged in
Given a part marked as 'Purchaseable' exists in the system with IPN 'RES-10K-0402'
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'RES-10K-0402'
When the user clicks the 'Suppliers' tab
When the user clicks the 'Import supplier part' button
When the user follows the wizard to select the supplier part to import
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Suppliers tab displays the newly imported supplier part linked to 'RES-10K-0402'
